programme.desc: The authors show the fascinating bond between people and horses.Traveling around the world, they present their point of view on horse riding and the community that builds it.They will also hold meetings with top players.

programme.desc: Match highlights, as well as goals and interesting situations that took place in the last round of the Europa League.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Europa League - match highlights
Football: UEFA Europa League - second leg quarter-final match: Nottingham Forest FC - FC Porto
Football: UEFA Europa League - second leg quarter-final match: Aston Villa FC - Bologna FC
Football: UEFA Europa League - second leg quarter-final match: Real Betis Balompie - SC Braga
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Legia Warszawa - Samsunspor
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Lech Poznań - 1. FSV Mainz 05
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: AC Sparta Prague - Raków Częstochowa
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Rayo Vallecano - Lech Poznań
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: KF Shkendija - Jagiellonia Białystok
programme.desc: The Pride of Podlasie started the league phase of the youngest UEFA competition with a modest victory over Hamrun Spartans 1-0.In the second round, Adrian Siemieniec's players faced the strong RC Strasbourg, drawing with them away 1-1.Now they are on a delegation to Skopje.KF Shkendija has a 0-2 defeat against Rayo Vallecano and a 1-0 victory over Shelbourne FC.Jagiellonia will be the favorite in the match at the stadium.Todor Proeski.Let's hope it plays its role better than the Lech Poznań players in the confrontation with Lincoln Red Imps from Gibraltar.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Lech Poznań - FC Lausanne-Sport
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Legia Warszawa - Samsunspor
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Lech Poznań - 1. FSV Mainz 05

Football: UEFA Europa League - second leg play-off match: FC Viktoria Plzeň - Panathinaikos AO
UEFA Europa League Archive
programme.sub-title: Odense - Wisła Kraków 01.12.2011 - sezon 2011/2012
programme.desc: In the program, viewers will see fragments of memorable matches played in the UEFA Europa League.From the 2009/2010 season, this competition replaced the previous UEFA Cup.The authors pay special attention to matches involving Polish clubs.The first Polish team to win the right to play in the LE group stage was Lech Poznań, later Wisła Kraków and Legia Warszawa also achieved this feat.The greatest success so far was promotion to the 1/16 finals of Lech in the 2010/2011 season, Legia and Wisła in the 2011/2012 season and Legia Warszawa in the 2014/2015 season.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Legia Warszawa - Samsunspor
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Lech Poznań - 1. FSV Mainz 05
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: AC Sparta Prague - Raków Częstochowa
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Rayo Vallecano - Lech Poznań
FIA World Endurance Championship: 6 Hours of Imola
Tennis: ATP Tournament in Barcelona - singles final match
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: AC Sparta Prague - Raków Częstochowa
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: AZ Alkmaar - Jagiellonia Białystok
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Omonia FC - Raków Częstochowa
programme.desc: The Medals are one of three teams in the Conference League that have not yet been defeated in the regular round.The Częstochowa team has already secured their place in the knockout phase, but they do not intend to be satisfied with that.They are counting on direct promotion to the 1/8 finals, which will give them a place in the best eight at the end of the league phase of the competition.Before the clash with Omonia, coached by former Legia coach Henning Berg, they are in third place in the table.The team from Nicosia is fifteenth and has eight points, three less than Raków.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Legia Warszawa - Lincoln Red Imps FC
Football: UEFA Conference League - play-off match: KuPS Kuopio - Lech Poznań
Football: UEFA Conference League - play-off match: Jagiellonia Białystok - ACF Fiorentina

programme.desc: In the program, viewers will see fragments of memorable matches played in the UEFA Europa League.From the 2009/2010 season, this competition replaced the previous UEFA Cup.The authors pay special attention to matches involving Polish clubs.The first Polish team to win the right to play in the LE group stage was Lech Poznań, later Wisła Kraków and Legia Warszawa also achieved this feat.The greatest success so far was promotion to the 1/16 finals of Lech in the 2010/2011 season, Legia and Wisła in the 2011/2012 season and Legia Warszawa in the 2014/2015 season.

programme.desc: In the program, viewers will see fragments of memorable matches played in the UEFA Europa League.From the 2009/2010 season, this competition replaced the previous UEFA Cup.The authors pay special attention to matches involving Polish clubs.The first Polish team to win the right to play in the LE group stage was Lech Poznań, later Wisła Kraków and Legia Warszawa also achieved this feat.The greatest success so far was promotion to the 1/16 finals of Lech in the 2010/2011 season, Legia and Wisła in the 2011/2012 season and Legia Warszawa in the 2014/2015 season.

programme.title: Polsat Sport Talk Extra
programme.desc: Przemysław Iwańczyk talks about sports with people from outside his circle, including:from culture, medicine, science and politics.Thanks to them, sport appears as a complex process influencing results.

Football from the archives
programme.desc: The most interesting fragments of football matches that were remembered by fans.Fans will remember beautiful actions, amazing goals and phenomenal goalkeeper interventions.

programme.title: Football: Italian league - match: Hellas Verona - AC Milan
programme.desc: Only a miracle can ensure Hellas stays in Serie A for another season.However, until the ball is in play, Paul Sammarco's players will not give up, just like Milan's players in the fight for the Scudetto.The Rossoneri will arrive in Verona with a strong determination to improve.They suffered defeats in the previous two rounds.The 0-1 loss against Napoli does not bring any disadvantage to them, but the 0-3 loss against Udinese gives reasons to worry about the morale of the Milan team.Only a high victory over the Yellow and Blue can blunt the criticism directed towards Massimiliano Allegri's team in recent days.

programme.title: Combat sports: FEN

programme.desc: A program dedicated to football.Fans often learn extremely different opinions on a given topic.The new format will be hosted by Tomasz Hajto and Roman Kołtoń, as well as Bożedar Iwanow and Maciej Stolarczyk.

Men's volleyball: PlusLiga - 1st semi-final match of the play-off phase: PGE Projekt Warszawa - Bogdanka LUK Lublin
Women's volleyball: TAURON Liga - 1st final match of the play-off phase: KS DevelopRes Rzeszów - PGE Budowlani Łódź
programme.desc: In the grand final of TAURON Liga, Jelena Blagojević's players will face PGE Budowlani Łódź.This will be the third clash between these teams this season.Each team won one victory in the league, while in the semi-final of the Polish Cup the Łódź team prevailed and finally won the trophy.The visiting team eliminated UNI Opole in the play-off semi-finals after winning two matches.In turn, the volleyball players of KS DevelopRes Rzeszów faced BKS BOSTIK ZGO Bielsko-Biała, and three matches were needed to advance.

programme.title: Football: Copa Libertadores - match: SE Palmeiras - Club Sporting Cristal
Football: Copa Libertadores - match: CR Flamengo - Independiente Medellin
Tennis: ATP Tournament in Barcelona - 2nd round singles match
Men's volleyball: PlusLiga - 1st semi-final match of the play-off phase: PGE Projekt Warszawa - Bogdanka LUK Lublin
Kosa to Kosa
programme.desc: In the program, Jakub and Roman Kosecki share their thoughts and reflections with fans.The hit duo's attention is focused on current football issues.

programme.title: Men's volleyball: PlusLiga - match for 5th place in the play-off phase: Indykpol AZS Olsztyn - PGE GieK Skra Bełchatów
Tennis: ATP Tournament in Munich - singles quarterfinal match
Tennis: ATP Tournament in Munich - singles quarterfinal match
Tennis: ATP Tournament in Munich - singles quarterfinal match
Men's volleyball: PlusLiga - match for 5th place in the play-off phase: PGE GieK Skra Bełchatów - Indykpol AZS Olsztyn
Men's basketball: ORLEN Basket Liga - match: WKS Śląsk Wrocław - Tasomix Rosiek Stal Ostrów Wielkopolski
Men's volleyball: PlusLiga - 1st semi-final match of the play-off phase: PGE Projekt Warszawa - Bogdanka LUK Lublin
Tennis: ATP Tournament in Barcelona - singles quarterfinal match
Women's volleyball: TAURON Liga - 1st match for 3rd place: UNI Opole - BKS BOSTIK ZGO Bielsko-Biała
programme.desc: In the fight for 3rd place, we will see the UNI Opole volleyball players against the players of BKS BOSTIK ZGO Bielsko-Biała.The hosts were eliminated from the semi-finals of the play-off phase after just two matches with PGE Budowlani Łódź.Bartłomiej Piekarczyk's players competed with KS DevelopRes Rzeszów.This clash was more even, and three matches had to be played to decide the outcome.For the volleyball players from Bielsko-Biała, it's a repeat of last year.Then they also competed for the bronze medal, but they had to admit the superiority of PGE Budowlani Łódź.

programme.title: Tennis: ATP Tournament in Barcelona - singles quarterfinal match

programme.desc: The latest news from the boxing world.Boxing fans will find in this program, among others:results of the most important fights, announcements of galas and interesting facts related to this spectacular sport.

programme.sub-title: Karabin pneumatyczny
programme.desc: Viewers will learn about various sports shooting competitions.They will learn how to start training and learn the differences between individual weapons, including:a smoothbore shotgun and a ball rifle.

programme.desc: The latest news from the boxing world.Boxing fans will find in this program, among others:results of the most important fights, announcements of galas and interesting facts related to this spectacular sport.

programme.title: Combat sports: Babilon MMA 53 in Międzyzdroje - fight: Szymon Kołecki - Marcin Łazarz 18/07/2025
Boxing: Polsat Boxing Promotions 10 in Łódź - super middleweight: Osleys Iglesias - Ezequiel Maderna 24/09/2022
programme.desc: El Tornado de Cuba, Osleys Iglesias tied his fate with Poland.Since December 2021, he has appeared in galas organized by Polsat Boxing Promotions three times and emerged victorious three times.The talented Cuban's opponent will be a very experienced boxer from Argentina.35-year-old Ezequiel Maderna has 35 professional fights, 27 of which he won.Recently, however, he has not had a good streak and has suffered three defeats in a row.In March 2022, he was defeated by, among others, Paweł Stępień.

programme.title: Combat sports: First Step Championship 11 in Bytów - welterweight: Rafał Błachuta - Wallison Henrique 22/02/2025

programme.sub-title: Walka o pasy WBC, WBA i IBF w Atlantic City - waga ciężka: Mike Tyson - Michael Spinks 27.06.1988
programme.desc: A reminder of the fights that aroused exceptional emotions in the boxing world.Viewers will once again see the clashes of the biggest stars of Polish and foreign boxing.

programme.desc: The program introduces viewers to the secrets of shooting.Types of weapons will be characterized and issues related to, among others, discussed:with hunting.Polish sports stars will be subjected to shooting tests.

Boxing: Gala in Zawonia - heavyweight: Damian Knyba - Aazddin Aajour 07/01/2022
Combat sports: UFC 315 - fight: Belal Muhammad - Jack Della Maddalena 11/05/2025
programme.desc: We will see two title fights at the Bell Center in Montreal.First, Valentina Shevchenko will enter the octagon to defend her flyweight belt for the tenth time.The contender for the title is Manon Fiorot from France.The main course will be the fight between Belal Muhammad and Jacek Della Maddalena.The popular Remember the Name won the welterweight championship on June 24, 2024, defeating Leon Edwards on points.The belt will be tried by Della Maddalena from Australia, who has won seventeen fights in a row, including seven under the UFC banner.

programme.title: Combat sports: UFC 321 - fight: Tom Aspinall - Ciryl Gane 25/10/2025

programme.title: From the ESPN archives
programme.sub-title: Gala w Louisville - waga ciężka: Cassius Clay (Muhammad Ali) - Alonzo Johnson 22.07.1961
programme.desc: A reminder of the fights that aroused exceptional emotions in the boxing world.Viewers will once again see the clashes of the biggest stars of Polish and foreign boxing.

programme.title: Ninja vs. Ninja
programme.desc: The new season of the program promises competition at the highest level.However, the age of participants is lowering - even sixteen-year-olds will take part in this edition.They want to prove that experience does not necessarily always trump youthful zeal and enthusiasm.The Poland versus the rest of the world formula was restored to the program.In this edition, Jan Tatarowicz has a chance to take away the title of best ninja from the previous season from Clément Gravier.The program will also feature runner-up Samuel Folsom and Isabella Folsom - winner of the Last Woman Standing title.These athletes are among the world's best today.Polish players will be supported by experienced leaders and coaches, including:Paweł Murawski, Krzysztof Orankiewicz, Grzegorz Matyszewski and Grzegorz Niecko.Special guests are also expected to participate, such as Piotr Żyła and Bartek Wrona.

programme.title: UFC Connected
programme.sub-title: Erin Blanchfield \u0026 Fatima Kline, Joselyne Edwards, Laura Sanko, Rose Namajunas
programme.desc: A program devoted to combat sports, especially events related to the UFC federation.Fans will find there, among others:interesting interviews with players, summaries of galas and various interesting facts.
